name: Arizer Solo 3 XL Mouthpiece 90mm
summary: Experience an elevated vaping experience with the enhanced glass pod system, which boasts a larger herb capacity and improved airflow.
description: Experience an elevated vaping experience with the enhanced glass pod system, which boasts a larger herb capacity and improved airflow. This all-in-one glass pod and mouthpiece provides effortless use and easy maintenance. Load the ideal amount of herbal material with precision for accurate dosing. Only compatible with the Solo III vaporiser. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
